recommendations.title: Over the Moon
recommendations.overview: Fueled by memories of her mother, resourceful Fei Fei builds a rocket to the moon on a mission to prove the existence of a legendary moon goddess.

recommendations.title: The Legend of Drunken Master
recommendations.overview: Returning home with his father after a shopping expedition, Wong Fei-Hong is unwittingly caught up in the battle between foreigners who wish to export ancient Chinese artifacts and loyalists who don't want the pieces to leave the country. Fei-Hong mu

recommendations.title: SS Experiment Love Camp
recommendations.overview: Near the end of WW2, prisoners of war are used in experiments to perfect the Arian race.

recommendations.title: The Eight Hundred
recommendations.overview: In 1937, eight hundred Chinese soldiers fight under siege from a warehouse in the middle of the Shanghai battlefield, completely surrounded by the Japanese army.

recommendations.title: Barefoot Gen
recommendations.overview: A story about the effect of the atomic bombing of Hiroshima on a boy's life and the lives of the Japanese people.

recommendations.title: The Round Up
recommendations.overview: A faithful retelling of the 1942 "Vel' d'Hiv Roundup" and the events surrounding it.

recommendations.title: City of Life and Death
recommendations.overview: In 1937, during the height of the Second Sino-Japanese War, the Imperial Japanese Army has just captured Nanjing, then-capital of the Republic of China. What followed was known as the Nanking Massacre, or the Rape of Nanking, a six week period wherei

recommendations.title: Devils on the Doorstep
recommendations.overview: During the Japanese occupation of China, two prisoners are dumped in a peasant's home in a small town. The owner is bullied into keeping the prisoners until the next New Year, at which time they will be collected. The village leaders convene to inter

recommendations.title: John Rabe
recommendations.overview: A true-story account of a German businessman who saved more than 200,000 Chinese during the Nanjing massacre in 1937-38.

recommendations.title: Air Strike
recommendations.overview: An American pilot is sent to a Chinese province to teach a crew of would-be pilots how to fly war planes against the Japanese during World War II.
